summary: Iteration 62 — Daily Replenishment workflow tested end-to-end. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_62.py (10 tests). Backend: 8/10 PASS — all functional flows (config GET/POST, report owners override, days_lapsed/state fields, mark-done, completed audit) work after a 1-line bug fix. Two failing tests are RBAC gaps (viewer can hit admin-only endpoints). Frontend: All UI requirements met — Sidebar Replenishments link present, /replenishments page renders for admin, owner roster panel + 4 name inputs work, table has all 13 expected columns with NO Country column visible, days_lapsed pill renders muted when ≤2d, 175 mark-done buttons / 175 actual inputs / 4 PDF buttons (testid replen-pdf-<owner>), Completed report card visible to admin, Mark As Done removes a row from live list (175→174), 'Daily Replenishment' tab REMOVED from /exports, and viewer is correctly redirected away from /replenishments (no sidebar link, direct nav redirects to /).

critical.issue: AttributeError: 'User' object has no attribute 'full_name' caused 500 on every mark-done call. User model uses .name not .full_name. FIXED by testing agent in /app/backend/server.py line 6622-6624 (full_name -> name).

Uses Depends(get_current_user) instead of Depends(require_admin). Viewer (role=viewer) can persist any owner roster — verified by test test_viewer_forbidden returning 200 with payload {ok:true,owners:['X']}. Spec explicitly says 'Non-admin gets 403'.
Has NO auth dependency at all (anonymous can read the roster). Should be require_admin per spec.
Uses Depends(get_current_user) instead of Depends(require_admin). Viewer can read the entire chain-wide completed-replenishment audit trail (verified: 200 OK with rows). Spec says 'Admin only.'

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully verify within 8s wait window that summary pills update from default 4 owners (Matthew/Teddy/Alvi/Emma) to a saved roster of ['Alice','Bob']. POST persisted correctly (backend test_post_custom_roster_persists PASSED) and report?owners=Alice,Bob also distributes correctly. Likely just needs a longer wait — heavy report can exceed 8s. Suggest main agent to sanity-check manually that summary pills update after save, but no functional bug evidence.

action_items: Add Depends(require_admin) to GET and POST /api/admin/replenishment-config (currently anonymous and any-authenticated-user respectively).
Add Depends(require_admin) to GET /api/analytics/replenishment-completed (currently any-authenticated-user — viewer can read audit trail).
Optional: add a small visual hint while replenishment-report is recomputing after a roster save (the 8s+ silent wait makes the redistribution feel laggy).
critical_code_review_comments: Replenishments.jsx is 660 lines — tolerable but borderline; consider splitting OwnerPanel + CompletedTable into sibling components for reuse.
server.py line 6622 used user.full_name which doesn't exist on the User pydantic model (only .name). Was a latent 500 on every Mark As Done; fixed by testing agent.

/api/admin/* routes rely on ad-hoc Depends(require_admin) per route — easy to miss. Recommend adding the dependency to admin_router itself (router-level dependencies=[Depends(require_admin)]) so future endpoints are admin-only by default.
_repl_cache uses (df,dt,country,owners) tuple as cache key — invalidates on roster change correctly, but a stale-cache for a recently-saved roster persists for the TTL. Acceptable.

Country field still passed in /mark payload from frontend (line 211 of Replenishments.jsx) even though spec says removed from UI; harmless for backward-compat but you might want to drop it from the request body too.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use existing data. Cleanup fixture restores default roster after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent applies require_admin to the 3 endpoints, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_62.py — should be 10/10. The User.full_name -> User.name fix has already been applied. Frontend roster save→redistribution can be re-tested by waiting >15s for the heavy /replenishment-report recompute, then asserting summary pills contain Alice/Bob.
rca_of_the_issue: Mark As Done 500: User pydantic model in /app/backend/auth.py defines .name (not .full_name), but /app/backend/server.py line 6622 referenced user.full_name → AttributeError → 500. Fixed by changing to user.name. RBAC gaps: routes added with Depends(get_current_user) where spec required Depends(require_admin). All admin endpoints under /api/admin/* should ideally be guarded by router-level admin dependency.
